data.current_description: Synthesizes text to audio that is spoken in the specified voice
data.description_suggestion: Converts provided text into natural-sounding speech audio using the specified voice, language, and optional formatting parameters. Accepts text input and voice selection parameters. Returns synthesized audio in the requested format (e.g., WAV, MP3, Ogg). Supports various voices, languages, and dialects available in the service.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks details about input parameters (text, voice selection), output format options, and supported voice/language variations. AI agents need clarity on what parameters are required, what audio formats are available, and what the response contains.

message: Operation 'get_v1_voices' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Summary is too brief and generic. Description should clarify what metadata is returned for each voice (ID, language, gender, etc.) and note that this is an unauthenticated endpoint. This helps AI agents understand the response structure and when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Lists all available voices for speech synthesis
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all available voices for text-to-speech synthesis, including supported languages, dialects, and voice characteristics. Returns metadata for each voice including voice ID, language, gender, and other descriptive properties. No authentication required.
data.reasoning: Summary is too brief and generic. Description should clarify what metadata is returned for each voice (ID, language, gender, etc.) and note that this is an unauthenticated endpoint. This helps AI agents understand the response structure and when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'get_v1_voices_voice' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary lacks specificity about what 'voice' means. Description needs clarification on the voice parameter format (voice ID), what metadata fields are returned, and that authentication is not required. data.current_description: Gets information about the specified voice
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific voice identified by the voice parameter. Returns voice metadata including language, dialect, gender, voice characteristics, and supported features. The voice parameter should be the voice ID (e.g., 'en-US_AllisonVoice'). No authentication required.
data.reasoning: Summary lacks specificity about what 'voice' means. Description needs clarification on the voice parameter format (voice ID), what metadata fields are returned, and that authentication is not required. AI agents need to know the exact parameter format to construct valid requests.

message: Operation 'get_v1_pronunciation' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is vague about the domain context (phonetic/IPA). data.current_description: Gets the phonetic pronunciation for the specified text
data.description_suggestion: Returns the phonetic pronunciation for specified text using the indicated voice and format. Accepts text input and optional parameters for voice selection and pronunciation format (e.g., IPA, SPR). Returns phonetic representation suitable for speech synthesis. Useful for understanding how text will be pronounced or for customizing pronunciation in custom models.
data.reasoning: Summary is vague about the domain context (phonetic/IPA). Description lacks details about input parameters (text, voice, format options) and output format. data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all custom voice models created by the authenticated user.
